raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has enacted a comprehensive package of laws that hold offenders accountable and address the root causes of crime.",
    "New retail theft laws in California include a felony charge for individuals who repeatedly commit retail theft.",
    "California's new laws impose sentencing enhancements of up to four-plus years for high value property theft or destruction.",
    "The new retail theft laws require courts to look at the underlying causes of theft and encourage diversion and rehabilitation for individuals experiencing substance use or poverty.",
    "California's legislation creates a retail crime restraining order that can last up to two years to address vandalism, assault, and theft.",
    "The new laws include the authorization for courts to impose a Retail Crime Restraining Order.",
    "New legislation allows law enforcement to aggregate stolen property across different locations and victims to charge an individual with Felony Grand Theft.",
    "California is expanding CHP property crimes task forces to increase levels of cargo theft enforcement."
  ]
}
```
